package rulecoverage

// Negative scenario for malformed_struct_tag: shows the preferred shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: Struct field tags that do not parse as valid Go tag key/value pairs.
type NegativeMalformedStructTagUser struct {
    ID string `json:"id" db:"id"`
}

func (u *NegativeMalformedStructTagUser) IDValue() string { return u.ID }
func (u *NegativeMalformedStructTagUser) Rename(id string) { u.ID = id }
